testcase.classname: POST /api/register should register a new user and return token
testcase.name: POST /api/register should register a new user and return token

testcase.classname: POST /api/register should return 400 if username or password missing
testcase.name: POST /api/register should return 400 if username or password missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/register should return 409 if username already exists
testcase.name: POST /api/register should return 409 if username already exists

testcase.classname: POST /api/login should login and return token
testcase.name: POST /api/login should login and return token

testcase.classname: POST /api/login should return 401 with wrong password
testcase.name: POST /api/login should return 401 with wrong password

testcase.classname: POST /api/login should return 401 with wrong username
testcase.name: POST /api/login should return 401 with wrong username

testcase.classname: GET /api/films should return empty array when no films
testcase.name: GET /api/films should return empty array when no films

testcase.classname: GET /api/films should return list of films
testcase.name: GET /api/films should return list of films

testcase.classname: POST /api/films should create film as admin
testcase.name: POST /api/films should create film as admin

testcase.classname: POST /api/films should return 403 if not admin
testcase.name: POST /api/films should return 403 if not admin

testcase.classname: POST /api/films should return 401 if no token
testcase.name: POST /api/films should return 401 if no token

testcase.classname: POST /api/films should return 400 if title missing
testcase.name: POST /api/films should return 400 if title missing

testcase.classname: GET /api/films/:id should return film by id
testcase.name: GET /api/films/:id should return film by id

testcase.classname: GET /api/films/:id should return 400 for invalid id
testcase.name: GET /api/films/:id should return 400 for invalid id

testcase.classname: GET /api/films/:id should return 404 if film not found
testcase.name: GET /api/films/:id should return 404 if film not found

testcase.classname: PUT /api/films/:id should update film as admin
testcase.name: PUT /api/films/:id should update film as admin

testcase.classname: PUT /api/films/:id should return 403 if not admin
testcase.name: PUT /api/films/:id should return 403 if not admin

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/films/:id should delete film as admin
testcase.name: DELETE /api/films/:id should delete film as admin

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/films/:id should return 403 if not admin
testcase.name: DELETE /api/films/:id should return 403 if not admin

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/films/:id should return 404 if film not found
testcase.name: DELETE /api/films/:id should return 404 if film not found
